title: Employment Issues - Gill Furniss MP
text_excerpt: Employment Issues - Gill Furniss MP Skip to main content Gill Furniss MP Home About Gill Latest News Newsletters In Parliament Help and Advice Benefits Education Employment Issues Health and Social Care Housing Issues Immigration Legal Matters Local Government Policy and Legislation Privacy Policy Get in Touch Disability Access Pride in Parson Cross More Menu Employment Issues Problems to do with working conditions, health and safety, dismissal, redundancy etc. are a matter for a legal professional or your Trade Union. If you are not a member of a Trade Union you can find out about your employment rights from an advice agency such as Citizens Advice Sheffield or ACAS . If you require further assistance, please do get in touch .
